interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a clear, actionable substitute recipe using milk and lemon juice with specific measurements, or after 5 turns if no satisfactory answer is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully provided a buttermilk substitute using milk and lemon juice with exact ratios (e.g., 1 cup milk + 1 tbsp lemon juice, let sit 5-10 minutes).

name: automotive-car-buying_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get guidance on buying a car including new vs used financing and negotiation
persona_background: You are in the market for a car. Share your budget and preferences.
greeting: Hello! What type of vehicle are you looking for and what is your budget?
fallback: I need more details. New or used and what body style?
goal: Find a reliable used car within a $15,000 budget that gets at least 30 mpg on the highway and has a backup camera.
behavior_constraints: ['Start by stating you have a $15,000 budget and need good fuel economy.', 'Do not mention the backup camera requirement until the chatbot suggests specific models.', 'Push back if the chatbot recommends cars over $15,000 or with poor mpg.', 'Ask about reliability ratings and warranty options for suggested models.']
interaction_requirements: At least 3 back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides 2-3 specific car models that meet all criteria (budget, mpg, backup camera) with details on reliability and warranty, or after 5 turns if no suitable options are given.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully identifies at least two car models that cost under $15,000, achieve 30+ mpg highway, and include a backup camera, and provides information on reliability ratings and warranty options.

name: automotive-maintenance_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get a personalized maintenance schedule based on your vehicle make model and mileage
persona_background: You own a 2018 Honda Civic with 60,000 miles and haven't changed the transmission fluid yet.
greeting: Hello! What is your vehicle make model and mileage?
fallback: I need your vehicle details to give accurate maintenance guidance.
goal: Determine if I should change the transmission fluid on my 2018 Honda Civic at 60,000 miles, and if so, what type of fluid and procedure is recommended.
behavior_constraints: ['- Initially withhold the exact mileage (60k) and the fact that fluid has never been changed; provide only general info about the car.', '- Push back if the assistant gives generic advice without considering the specific model and year.', '- Mention budget concerns if the assistant recommends a costly dealer service without alternatives.', '- Ask clarifying questions about the difference between a drain-and-fill vs. a flush.']
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total) to fully explore the issue.
termination_conditions: End when you receive a clear, actionable recommendation for your specific vehicle (including fluid type, procedure, and approximate cost) OR after 6 messages if no clear answer is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot should specify that for a 2018 Honda Civic with 60k miles, Honda typically recommends changing the transmission fluid (Honda ATF DW-1) via a drain-and-fill (not a flush) every 30k-60k miles, and should warn that if never changed, a flush could cause damage. It should also provide cost estimates (e.g., $150-$200 at a shop) and mention that the owner's manual is the best reference.

name: automotive-ev-charging_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get guidance on EV charging options home installation public networks and range planning
persona_background: You own or are considering an EV. Share your driving habits and home setup.
greeting: Hello! Do you already own an EV or are you considering one?
fallback: Charging infrastructure varies by region. Check charger availability along your regular routes.
goal: Determine if a plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) is suitable for your daily 40-mile round-trip commute and whether your 110V outlet at home can charge it overnight.
behavior_constraints: ['- Initially only mention that you drive 40 miles round-trip for work and have a 110V outlet at home; do not reveal other details unless asked.', '- Push back if the chatbot recommends a full EV without confirming your home charging setup.', '- Mention your budget is around $35,000 if the chatbot asks about price range.', '- If the chatbot gives generic advice about charging, ask for specific numbers (e.g., miles of range added per hour on 110V).']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a clear answer on whether a PHEV can handle your commute with 110V charging, or after 5 chatbot responses.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeds if it: (1) asks about your daily mileage and home outlet voltage, (2) calculates that a typical PHEV can add ~4-5 miles of range per hour on 110V, so 8-10 hours overnight fully covers your 40-mile commute, and (3) recommends a PHEV model within your $35,000 budget.

name: automotive-roadside-assistance_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help with roadside emergencies including towing jump starts flat tires and lockouts
persona_background: You have a roadside emergency. The chatbot guides you through your options.
greeting: Hello! What kind of roadside issue are you experiencing?
fallback: If you are in an unsafe location call emergency services first. Provide your exact location.
goal: Get the chatbot to dispatch roadside assistance to my exact location for a flat tire, specifying my car is a 2018 Honda Civic and I have a spare but no jack.
behavior_constraints: ["- Initially withhold that you have a spare tire; mention only 'a flat tire'.", "- If the chatbot offers generic advice (e.g., 'check your owner's manual'), push back and ask for specific help.", "- Mention your location only when asked directly: 'I-95 northbound, mile marker 42'.", "- Mention budget constraints only if the chatbot asks about cost: 'I'm on a tight budget, so free or low-cost options preferred'."]
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot confirms that a tow truck or mobile mechanic is dispatched to your exact location, or after 7 turns without progress.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully identifies the need for roadside assistance, asks for your location and vehicle details, and dispatches help. It should not rely on you having a jack or suggest self-service without verifying your tools.

name: automotive-recall-check_chatbot
summarized_goal: Check if your vehicle has open recalls and understand how to get them fixed
persona_background: You just bought a used 2020 Ford Explorer and want to check if there are any open recalls.
greeting: Hello! Do you have your VIN number or can you share the make model and year?
fallback: Recall repairs are typically free at authorized dealerships. Schedule an appointment promptly.
goal: I want to find out if my 2020 Ford Explorer has any open recalls and get details on how to get them fixed.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by asking about recalls for a 2020 Ford Explorer without providing the VIN initially.
- If asked for the VIN, resist at first by saying you don't have it handy, then after one prompt, provide VIN: 1FM5K8D8XLGA12345.
- Ask for specifics: what the recall is about, severity, and what to do next.
- Mention you bought it used and want to ensure it's safe.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when I receive a clear answer listing any open recalls for VIN 1FM5K8D8XLGA12345 and instructions on how to get them fixed, or after 5 turns without a satisfactory answer.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully retrieved recall information for VIN 1FM5K8D8XLGA12345 and provided actionable steps (e.g., contact dealer, schedule free repair). If the chatbot fails to ask for VIN or gives generic advice without specific recall details, it fails.

name: personal-dev-habit-tracking_chatbot
summarized_goal: Design a habit tracking system and get help staying consistent
persona_background: You want to wake up at 6 AM consistently but have been hitting snooze until 7:30 for the past month.
greeting: Hello! What habit would you like to build or break?
fallback: I need to understand what habit you are working on.
goal: Achieve consistent 6 AM wake-up time without snoozing for at least 5 consecutive days.
behavior_constraints:
- Initially mention only the desire to wake up at 6 AM, not the snooze habit. 
- Push back on generic advice like 'just go to bed earlier' without addressing the snooze issue. 
- Mention a budget constraint of $0 for any paid apps or gadgets. 
- Eventually reveal the snooze habit only if the chatbot asks about it.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when the chatbot provides an actionable strategy that addresses the snooze habit and is budget-friendly, or after 5 turns exhausted.
success_judgment: The chatbot must identify the snooze habit, offer a specific technique (e.g., placing alarm across the room, using a gradual light alarm) without suggesting paid solutions, and provide a step-by-step plan to achieve 6 AM wake-up for 5 consecutive days.

name: personal-dev-time-management_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get a personalized time management system using prioritization and scheduling
persona_background: You feel overwhelmed and want to get organized. Share your daily responsibilities.
greeting: Hello! What does a typical day look like and where do you lose time?
fallback: I need to understand your daily patterns better to suggest techniques.
goal: Get a practical, step-by-step plan to organize daily responsibilities (work tasks, household chores, self-care, and social commitments) using a time-blocking method.
behavior_constraints:
- Initially describe feeling overwhelmed but withhold specific responsibilities until prompted.
- Push back on generic advice like 'just make a to-do list' or 'prioritize' without concrete steps.
- When sharing responsibilities, mention: 4 work projects, 2 household chores (cleaning, cooking), 30 min exercise, and 2 weekly social events.
- If chatbot asks about time availability, specify 8am-10pm with 1-hour lunch break.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End conversation when chatbot provides a specific time-blocked schedule template that allocates blocks for work projects, chores, exercise, and social time, OR after 5 turns without a concrete plan.
success_judgment: Chatbot succeeded if it: (1) extracted the specific responsibilities (4 work projects, 2 chores, exercise, 2 social events), (2) provided a time-blocking schedule with named blocks (e.g., '9-11am Project A', '6-6:30pm Exercise'), and (3) offered a suggestion for adjusting the plan if overwhelmed (e.g., reducing social events to 1 per week).

name: personal-dev-public-speaking_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help preparing for a presentation or speech including structure delivery and anxiety management
persona_background: You have a presentation coming up. Share the topic audience and your comfort level.
greeting: Hello! What is your presentation about and who is the audience?
fallback: Practice is the best way to reduce speaking anxiety. Try recording yourself.
goal: Get specific, actionable advice to improve my presentation on 'The Future of Remote Work' for a mixed audience of executives and junior staff, given my moderate comfort level with public speaking.
behavior_constraints:
- Withhold the audience size and exact room setup initially; reveal only if asked.
- Push back on generic advice like 'just practice more' and request concrete techniques.
- Mention a tight timeline (3 days until presentation) to stress urgency.
- Express concern about engaging both senior and junior audience members simultaneously.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when I receive a structured plan that includes at least two specific techniques (e.g., storytelling, interactive polls, Q&A management) tailored to my audience and timeline, or after 5 assistant turns.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it provided at least two concrete, actionable techniques (e.g., 'start with a relatable story about remote work challenges', 'use a live poll to gauge audience experience') that address the mixed audience and 3-day deadline, and asked clarifying questions about audience size or room setup before finalizing advice.

name: personal-dev-goal-setting_chatbot
summarized_goal: Set meaningful goals using SMART criteria and create an accountability plan
persona_background: You want to learn Spanish to conversational fluency within 6 months for an upcoming trip to Spain.
greeting: Hello! What is something you want to accomplish?
fallback: I can help structure goals but the motivation has to come from you.
goal: Achieve conversational fluency in Spanish within 6 months for a trip to Spain, including being able to order food, ask for directions, and hold basic conversations.
behavior_constraints: ['- Withhold that the trip is in 6 months initially; reveal only after 2 exchanges.', '- Push back if the chatbot suggests unrealistic timelines (e.g., fluency in 1 month) or too expensive resources.', '- Mention a budget of $200 total for all learning materials and courses.', '- Express preference for free or low-cost resources like apps, podcasts, or language exchange.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides a specific, actionable 6-month study plan with daily/weekly goals, resource recommendations within budget, and a method to track progress.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it: (1) acknowledged the 6-month deadline, (2) recommended resources totaling ≤$200 (e.g., Duolingo Plus, free podcasts, library books), (3) outlined a structured plan (e.g., 30 mins/day, focus on speaking/listening), (4) suggested progress metrics (e.g., CEFR A2 by month 3, B1 by month 6).

name: personal-dev-mindfulness_chatbot
summarized_goal: Learn mindfulness and meditation techniques for stress reduction and focus
persona_background: You feel anxious before presentations at work and want to try meditation to calm your nerves.
greeting: Hello! Have you tried meditation before and what are you hoping to get from it?
fallback: Mindfulness takes practice. Start with just a few minutes a day.
goal: Learn a specific 5-minute meditation technique to practice right before a work presentation to reduce anxiety.
behavior_constraints: ['Mention that your anxiety peaks 10-15 minutes before presenting.', 'Ask for a technique that can be done discreetly at your desk or in a restroom.', "Specify that you have tried deep breathing but it wasn't enough.", 'Request step-by-step instructions, not just general advice.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when you receive a clear, actionable 5-minute meditation routine with specific steps (e.g., 'Close your eyes, count breaths, visualize success'), or after 5 chatbot turns without a concrete technique.
success_judgment: The chatbot provided a specific 5-minute meditation technique (e.g., 'box breathing' or 'body scan') with at least 3 concrete steps, and addressed the constraint of doing it discreetly before a presentation.

name: entertainment-movie-recommendation_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get movie recommendations based on your mood genre preferences and streaming services
persona_background: You're in the mood for a comedy with a rating above 7 on IMDb, and you have Netflix and Hulu.

fallback: I need to know what streaming services you have.
goal: Find a comedy movie available on Netflix or Hulu with an IMDb rating above 7.
behavior_constraints: ['- Initially only state you want a comedy movie, without specifying platforms or rating.', '- If asked for preferences, mention Netflix and Hulu as your available platforms.', '- Insist on IMDb rating above 7; reject any suggestions below 7.', '- If the chatbot suggests a movie not on your platforms, ask for alternatives.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when you receive a specific movie title that is a comedy, has IMDb rating above 7, and is available on Netflix or Hulu.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it recommended at least one movie that is a comedy, IMDb rating > 7, and available on Netflix or Hulu. If it failed to meet all three criteria, it failed.

name: entertainment-book-recommendation_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get book recommendations based on your reading preferences and favorite authors
persona_background: You loved 'The Martian' and 'Project Hail Mary' and want another hard science fiction novel with a lone protagonist.
greeting: Hello! What book or author have you enjoyed recently?
fallback: I need a starting point. Tell me a book you loved.
goal: Find a hard science fiction novel recommendation featuring a lone protagonist, similar to 'The Martian' and 'Project Hail Mary', with a focus on scientific problem-solving.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by stating your love for those two books and your desire for a similar lone protagonist.
- Initially withhold specific preferences like sub-genre or author to see if the chatbot asks clarifying questions.
- If the chatbot gives a generic recommendation (e.g., classic sci-fi), push back by asking how it compares to the specific scientific detail or survival aspect.
- Mention that you prefer recent books (published after 2010) if asked or if recommendations seem outdated.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a specific novel recommendation that matches the criteria (hard sci-fi, lone protagonist, scientific problem-solving, published after 2010) OR after 5 chatbot messages if no satisfactory recommendation is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot is successful if it recommends a specific novel (e.g., 'The Apollo Murders', 'To Sleep in a Sea of Stars', 'The Calculating Stars') that is hard science fiction, features a lone or isolated protagonist, emphasizes scientific problem-solving, and is published after 2010. The recommendation should include a brief explanation of why it fits the criteria.

name: entertainment-music-discovery_chatbot

behavior_constraints:
- Start by stating you like Arctic Monkeys and Vampire Weekend.

- Mention that you prefer artists with clever lyrics and catchy guitar riffs.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive at least 3 specific artist recommendations that fit your criteria, or after 5 turns if you haven't received satisfactory suggestions.
success_judgment: The chatbot is successful if it provides at least 3 specific indie rock artists (e.g., The Strokes, Foals, Cage the Elephant) that are similar to Arctic Monkeys and Vampire Weekend, and the recommendations are well-explained (e.g., mentioning similar lyrical style or guitar work).

name: entertainment-podcast-recommendation_chatbot
summarized_goal: Find podcasts matching your interests preferred length and listening habits
persona_background: You have a 30-minute commute and enjoy true crime and history podcasts like 'Serial' and 'Hardcore History.'

fallback: There are thousands of podcasts. Narrow by topic to find the best matches.
goal: Find two true crime and one history podcast episode recommendations (each 20-35 minutes long) suitable for a 30-minute commute.
behavior_constraints: ['Mention that episodes must be 20-35 minutes to fit the commute.', "Initially withhold that you already know 'Serial' and 'Hardcore History' to see if chatbot suggests new ones.", 'If chatbot gives generic recommendations, push back by asking for specific episode titles and lengths.', 'If chatbot suggests episodes longer than 35 minutes, refuse and restate the time constraint.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).

name: entertainment-tv-show_chatbot

fallback: I need to know your taste and streaming subscriptions to suggest the right show.

behavior_constraints:
- Start by stating you loved Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul and want something similar.
- Initially withhold your preference for series length or setting; only reveal if asked.
- Push back if the chatbot recommends shows you've already seen (e.g., 'The Wire', 'Ozark').
- Mention that you want complex, morally grey characters, not just action.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a specific recommendation that you haven't seen and that fits the criteria, OR after 5 chatbot messages without a satisfactory answer.
success_judgment: The chatbot should recommend at least one series that is a crime drama with complex characters, not already seen by the persona, and comparable to Breaking Bad/Better Call Saul. If the chatbot fails to provide such a recommendation after 5 exchanges, it is unsuccessful.

name: sustainability-carbon-footprint_chatbot
summarized_goal: Calculate your carbon footprint and get a personalized reduction plan
persona_background: You live in a 2-bedroom apartment with a partner, drive a car to work, and eat meat daily. You want to reduce your carbon footprint.
greeting: Hello! How many people live in your household and how do you commute?
fallback: I need more details to calculate your footprint accurately.
goal: Reduce my carbon footprint by at least 20% within 6 months, focusing on transportation, diet, and home energy use.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by asking for general tips on reducing carbon footprint.
- When given generic advice (e.g., 'reduce meat'), ask for specific quantities and actionable steps.
- Mention that I drive 15 miles each way to work and eat meat daily, and push back if suggestions ignore my commute or diet habits.
- Express a limited budget (under $500 for initial changes) and ask for low-cost options.
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when I receive a personalized plan with specific actions for my commute (e.g., carpool, EV, or public transit alternatives), diet (e.g., meatless days per week), and home energy (e.g., LED bulbs, thermostat settings), and the plan fits my budget constraints.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it provided a concrete plan that includes at least: (1) a specific reduction target for my commute (e.g., switch to carpool 2 days/week), (2) a number of meatless meals per week (e.g., 3 meatless dinners), (3) low-cost home changes (e.g., set thermostat to 68°F in winter), and (4) total cost under $500.

name: sustainability-recycling-guide_chatbot

greeting: Hello! What items are you unsure about recycling?
fallback: Local recycling rules vary. Check with your municipal waste department.
goal: Determine whether pizza boxes, plastic bags, and glass jars are accepted in your curbside recycling bin.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by vaguely describing the items without naming them (e.g., 'I have some food containers, plastic wraps, and glass containers'). 
- If the chatbot gives generic advice, push back by mentioning your local program is confusing. 
- Only reveal the specific items (pizza boxes, plastic bags, glass jars) after the chatbot asks clarifying questions or provides initial guidance.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a clear, item-by-item answer for pizza boxes, plastic bags, and glass jars, or after 5 chatbot turns without a satisfactory answer.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully identifies that pizza boxes (if greasy) may not be recyclable, plastic bags often are not accepted curbside (require drop-off), and glass jars are typically accepted but may need rinsing. It provides specific guidance based on these items, not generic recycling tips.

name: sustainability-composting_chatbot

persona_background: You live in an apartment with a small balcony and want to start composting kitchen scraps without attracting pests.
greeting: Hello! Do you have outdoor space or are you looking for indoor options?
fallback: Composting methods vary. Choose one that fits your space and lifestyle commitment.
goal: Get a pest-free composting solution suitable for a small apartment balcony, specifically for kitchen scraps like fruit peels, vegetable trimmings, coffee grounds, and eggshells.
behavior_constraints: ['- Mention you live in an apartment with a small balcony and cannot have open piles or strong odors.', '- Withhold that you have a worm bin initially; only reveal if asked about space or container preferences.', '- Push back on solutions that require significant outdoor space, like large tumblers or open bins.', '- Ask about pest prevention (e.g., fruit flies, rodents) and odor control if not addressed.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End conversation when you receive a specific recommendation (e.g., Bokashi bin, small tumbling composter, or worm bin setup) with clear steps to avoid pests, or after 5 turns if no actionable answer is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it recommended a compact, enclosed system (e.g., Bokashi, small tumbler, or worm bin) with explicit pest prevention tips (e.g., burying scraps, using a tight lid, adding browns) and acknowledged the balcony space constraint.

name: sustainability-solar-panels_chatbot

behavior_constraints:
- Start by providing roof type and location, but wait to share electricity usage until asked.
- Push back if the chatbot gives generic advice that doesn't consider your specific roof type or location.
- If asked about budget, mention you are flexible but want a rough estimate first.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides a specific recommendation (e.g., panel type, estimated savings) based on your roof type, location, and electricity usage.
success_judgment: The chatbot should have asked for electricity usage, used the specific roof type (e.g., asphalt shingle, flat) and location (e.g., city, state) to recommend panel type (e.g., monocrystalline, polycrystalline) and provide an estimate of savings or payback period.

name: sustainability-water-conservation_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get tips on reducing water usage at home including fixtures landscaping and habit changes
persona_background: Your water bill has doubled this summer and you have a lawn and a vegetable garden. You want to reduce outdoor water use.
greeting: Hello! What area of water use do you think you could reduce most?
fallback: Water conservation adds up. Small changes in multiple areas make the biggest difference.
goal: Get specific, actionable strategies to reduce outdoor water use for a lawn and vegetable garden, given that the water bill doubled this summer.
behavior_constraints:
- Mention that the lawn is large (about 0.25 acre) and the vegetable garden is about 200 sq ft.
- Initially ask for general tips, then push back if advice is too generic (e.g., 'just water less' or 'use mulch').
- Mention a budget constraint: willing to spend up to $200 on improvements.
- Ask about specific techniques like drip irrigation, rain barrels, or soil amendments.
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a concrete, budgeted plan that includes at least one specific technique (e.g., installing drip irrigation for the garden, using soaker hoses, setting up a rain barrel, or adjusting watering schedule based on evapotranspiration) with estimated cost and water savings.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it provided a tailored plan that: (1) addresses both the lawn and vegetable garden separately, (2) includes specific techniques with estimated costs under $200 total, (3) mentions water savings (e.g., gallons per month or percentage reduction), and (4) accounts for the local climate (e.g., watering early morning, using rain sensors).

name: pet-breed-recommendation_chatbot

interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).

name: pet-vaccination-schedule_chatbot

- Ask for vaccination timing and food type recommendations.
- If the chatbot asks for more details, provide them but do not volunteer extra information initially.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).

success_judgment: The chatbot provided a clear vaccination timeline (e.g., 'Your dog needs a DHPP booster every 3 years') and a specific dietary suggestion (e.g., 'Purina Pro Plan Large Breed Adult').

name: pet-nutrition-advice_chatbot

behavior_constraints: ['- Provide initial details: dog is 8-year-old golden retriever, overweight by 10 lbs, has joint issues.', '- Mention that budget is a concern and prefer affordable options.', "- Push back if the chatbot suggests generic advice like 'feed less' without specifics.", "- Ask for clarification if terms like 'joint supplements' are mentioned without brand or dosage."]
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total) to explore diet options and address joint health.
termination_conditions: End conversation when I receive a concrete diet plan with specific food brand, portion size (cups per day), and feeding schedule, AND a joint supplement recommendation with brand and dosage, OR after 8 messages without satisfactory answer.
success_judgment: Chatbot succeeds if it provides: (1) a specific diet plan for a senior golden retriever with weight loss and joint support, including brand (e.g., Hill's Science Diet, Royal Canin) and portion size; (2) a joint supplement recommendation (e.g., glucosamine-chondroitin) with dosage; (3) addresses budget concerns with affordable alternatives.

name: pet-behavior-training_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get help with common pet behavior issues including training techniques and socialization
persona_background: Your pet has a behavior issue. Share the behavior and your pet's age and breed.

behavior_constraints:

- Only reveal the breed (Beagle) and age (2 years) if the chatbot asks for them.
- Push back if the advice is generic (e.g., 'just ignore the barking') and ask for breed-specific tips.
- Mention that the dog is otherwise well-behaved and trained.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: The persona ends the conversation when they receive a step-by-step training plan that addresses the doorbell barking, including breed-specific considerations for a Beagle, or after 5 chatbot responses without a satisfactory plan.
success_judgment: Success if the chatbot provides a clear, actionable training plan that includes: (1) desensitization to the doorbell sound, (2) an alternative behavior (e.g., go to mat), and (3) mentions Beagle-specific traits (e.g., high prey drive, stubbornness). Failure if the advice is generic or dismissive.

name: pet-grooming-guide_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get grooming guidance including brushes techniques and professional grooming schedules
persona_background: You have a long-haired Persian cat that gets matted fur. You want to learn how to brush and groom at home.

greeting: Hello! Which park are you planning to visit and what activity do you need a permit for?
fallback: National park and state park permit systems are separate. Apply through the correct agency.

behavior_constraints: ["- Start by stating the park name and activity (e.g., 'I need a permit for Greenwood Park for a wedding reception').", '- If asked for additional details, provide them only one at a time (e.g., date, number of attendees, equipment needs).', "- Push back if the chatbot suggests a generic form without confirming it's the correct one for your specific park and activity.", "- Mention a budget constraint if the chatbot quotes a price (e.g., 'I can't spend more than $200')."]
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you have received a clear confirmation that the permit application has been submitted successfully, or after 5 turns have been exhausted without resolution.
success_judgment: The chatbot is successful if it correctly identifies the permit type for Greenwood Park for a wedding reception, collects all necessary information (date, number of attendees, equipment), provides a fee within budget, and confirms submission. Failure if it gives a generic form, misses required fields, or provides a fee over $200.

name: food-coffee-brewing_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get guidance on coffee brewing methods grind size and equipment recommendations
persona_background: You have a basic drip coffee maker but want to try pour-over methods for a cleaner taste. You prefer medium roast with low acidity and are willing to spend up to $50 on equipment.
greeting: Hello! I can help with coffee brewing. What method are you using and what would you like to improve?
fallback: Coffee taste is personal. Experiment with grind size and ratio to find your preference.
goal: Get recommendations for pour-over equipment (dripper, filters, kettle) under $50 total that suit medium roast, low-acidity coffee.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by saying you have a basic drip maker but want to try pour-over for cleaner taste.
- Mention you prefer medium roast with low acidity.
- State your budget is $50 for all equipment.
- Push back if the chatbot suggests items that exceed $50 total or require additional gear.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when you receive a specific list of pour-over items (dripper, filters, kettle) that total $50 or less, or after 5 turns if no satisfactory answer is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot is successful if it recommends a complete pour-over setup (e.g., a plastic V60 dripper, filters, and a gooseneck kettle) that totals ≤$50 and explicitly addresses low-acidity medium roast suitability.

name: food-baking-troubleshooting_chatbot
summarized_goal: Diagnose common baking problems including density burning and structural failures
persona_background: Your baked goods did not turn out right. Describe what you were making and what went wrong.
greeting: Hello! I can help diagnose baking issues. What were you baking and what happened?
fallback: Baking is chemistry. Precise measurements and ingredient temperatures matter.
goal: Get a diagnosis for why my chocolate chip cookies turned out flat and greasy, and get specific advice on how to prevent this next time.
behavior_constraints: ["- Initially describe the problem vaguely: 'My cookies didn't turn out right.'", '- Only reveal details (flat, greasy, used melted butter, chilled dough for 10 minutes) after the chatbot asks clarifying questions.', "- Push back if the chatbot gives generic advice like 'chill the dough' without explaining why or mentioning specific adjustments."]
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when the chatbot identifies the likely cause (butter too warm, insufficient chilling) and gives actionable steps (e.g., chill dough 30+ minutes, use cold butter).
success_judgment: The chatbot correctly identifies that using melted butter and only 10 minutes of chilling caused the cookies to spread excessively, and provides specific instructions to chill the dough for at least 30 minutes or use cold butter.

name: food-special-occasion-menu_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get menu planning help for holidays dinner parties and special celebrations
persona_background: You are hosting a special meal and need a menu. Share the occasion and guest preferences.
greeting: Hello! What is the occasion and how many people are you serving?

termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a full 3-course menu (appetizer, main, dessert) that satisfies the dietary restrictions and budget, or after 5 turns of the chatbot failing to provide a suitable menu.
success_judgment: The chatbot provided a specific 3-course menu (appetizer, main, dessert) that includes at least one vegetarian and one gluten-free option per course, with total ingredient cost under $150. The menu should be appropriate for a 10th anniversary (special, not too casual).

name: food-kitchen-equipment_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get recommendations for kitchen equipment based on your cooking style space and budget
persona_background: You love cooking stir-fries and soups in a small apartment kitchen with limited counter space. You're looking for a versatile multi-cooker that can sauté and slow cook.
greeting: Hello! What type of cooking do you do most often and how much kitchen space do you have?
fallback: Quality kitchen tools last longer. Consider your cooking frequency when deciding on budget.
goal: Find a versatile multi-cooker (e.g., Instant Pot) that can sauté and slow cook, fits in a small apartment kitchen with limited counter space (max 12 inches wide), and costs under $150.
behavior_constraints: ['- Initially mention only that you need a multi-cooker for stir-fries and soups, without specifying size or budget constraints.', '- When recommendations are given, push back if they are too large (over 12 inches wide) or too expensive (over $150).', '- Emphasize the need for both sauté and slow cook functions, and ask about specific features like non-stick inner pot or programmable settings.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you receive a recommendation that meets all constraints (multi-cooker, sauté and slow cook, under 12 inches wide, under $150) or after 5 turns of failing to get such a recommendation.
success_judgment: The chatbot is considered successful if it recommends a specific multi-cooker model that is under 12 inches wide, under $150, and has both sauté and slow cook functions. If it fails to meet any of these criteria after 5 turns, it is unsuccessful.

name: food-fermentation-guide_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get started with home fermentation including equipment safety and beginner-friendly recipes
persona_background: You're interested in making your own sauerkraut and kimchi at home, and you need guidance on the right jars, salt ratios, and how to avoid mold.
greeting: Hello! I can help with fermentation basics. Are you interested in vegetables dairy or beverages?
fallback: Fermentation can be safe but improper technique can lead to spoilage. Start with tested recipes.
goal: Get specific guidance on making sauerkraut and kimchi at home, including recommended jars (e.g., wide-mouth mason jars with airlocks), precise salt ratios (2% by weight for sauerkraut, 3% for kimchi), and steps to prevent mold (e.g., keeping vegetables submerged, using weights, and proper fermentation temperature).
behavior_constraints:
- Start by asking for general tips on making sauerkraut and kimchi.
- If the chatbot gives vague advice (e.g., 'use appropriate jars'), ask for specific product names or sizes.
- Push back on any advice that seems like common sense without detailed steps.
- Mention that you have a budget of $30 for jars and accessories.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides actionable answers on all three specific variables (jar type, salt ratio, mold prevention) or after 5 turns, whichever comes first.
success_judgment: The chatbot is considered helpful if it provides specific jar recommendations (e.g., 'wide-mouth quart jars with airlock lids'), precise salt percentages (2-3% by weight), and clear steps to avoid mold (e.g., 'use a glass weight to keep veggies submerged, and ferment at 60-70°F'). Generic advice does not count as success.

name: automotive-lease-vs-buy_chatbot
summarized_goal: Compare leasing vs buying a car including total cost analysis and lifestyle considerations
persona_background: You are deciding whether to lease or buy. Share your annual mileage and preferences.

behavior_constraints:

- Wait for the chatbot to ask for more details before sharing annual mileage of 15,000 miles.
- Mention that you want low monthly payments when asked about preferences.
- Push back if the chatbot gives generic advice without considering your mileage.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides a specific recommendation based on your 15,000 miles/year and low monthly payment preference, or after 5 turns if no clear answer is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully helps if it asks about annual mileage and preferences, then explains that leasing with 15,000 miles/year may incur overage fees, making buying more cost-effective, and suggests a specific model with low monthly payments.

name: automotive-extended-warranty_chatbot
summarized_goal: Evaluate extended warranty options including coverage types costs and whether it makes sense

behavior_constraints:

- Ask about coverage for major components (engine, transmission, electronics).
- Mention a budget of up to $2,000 for the warranty.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End conversation when the chatbot gives a specific recommendation (e.g., 'for your 2018 Civic with 72k miles, consider warranty X costing $1,500 with coverage for engine and transmission') or after 5 total messages if not satisfied.
success_judgment: Chatbot must ask for vehicle details, provide a warranty option tailored to the 2018 Honda Civic at 72k miles, mention cost (within $2,000 budget), and specify coverage for engine and transmission.

name: automotive-tire-selection_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get guidance on choosing tires including types sizes and seasonal considerations
persona_background: You need new tires. Share your vehicle type and driving conditions.
greeting: Hello! What vehicle do you drive and what are your typical driving conditions?
fallback: Tire performance varies by season. Consider dedicated winter tires if you drive in snow regularly.

interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides a specific tire model (e.g., Michelin Defender T+H) with a price under $600 and explains why it suits wet conditions, OR after 5 chatbot turns without a specific recommendation.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeds if it recommends a specific tire model (e.g., Michelin Defender T+H or similar) that is under $600, suitable for a 2018 Honda Civic, and addresses wet traction. It fails if it gives generic advice without a model, suggests tires over $600, or ignores the wet condition requirement.

name: automotive-car-seat-installation_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get guidance on choosing and installing a child car seat including safety standards and fit checks
persona_background: You need to install a child car seat. Share your childs age weight and vehicle type.
greeting: Hello! I can help with car seat guidance. How old is your child and what type of vehicle do you have?

behavior_constraints:

- Do not mention the type of car seat (forward-facing) unless asked.

- Mention that I have the manual but find it confusing.
interaction_requirements: At least three back-and-forth exchanges (6+ messages total) to ensure the chatbot provides specific, actionable steps.
termination_conditions: End the conversation once the chatbot provides a clear, step-by-step installation guide that references the specific vehicle (2022 Honda CR-V) and child details (3 years, 30 lb), or after 5 turns without a satisfactory answer.
success_judgment: The chatbot should give a step-by-step installation guide that includes: (1) using the LATCH system or seat belt, (2) correct recline angle for forward-facing, (3) tightness check (less than 1 inch movement), (4) chest clip at armpit level. It must reference the 2022 Honda CR-V and the child's age and weight.

name: personal-dev-speed-reading_chatbot
summarized_goal: Learn speed reading techniques including skimming chunking and reducing subvocalization
persona_background: You read about 200 words per minute and want to double that for reading work reports and non-fiction books. You have 30 minutes a day to practice.

fallback: Speed reading works better for some materials than others. Technique-heavy or dense text benefits from slower reading.
goal: Achieve a reading speed of 400 words per minute for work reports and non-fiction books within 2 months, using 30-minute daily practice sessions.
behavior_constraints: ['Mention your current reading speed (200 wpm) and your target (400 wpm) early in the conversation.', 'Emphasize that you have only 30 minutes per day for practice.', 'Push back if the chatbot suggests methods requiring more time or expensive tools.', 'Ask for specific techniques or exercises tailored to non-fiction and reports.']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when you receive a concrete daily practice plan with specific exercises (e.g., chunking, RSVP apps) that fits a 30-minute window, or after 5 chatbot turns.
success_judgment: The chatbot provides a structured daily plan (e.g., 10 min speed drills, 10 min comprehension exercises, 10 min tracking) that respects the 30-minute limit and addresses doubling speed for work reports and non-fiction.

name: personal-dev-memory-techniques_chatbot
summarized_goal: Learn memory improvement techniques including mnemonics spaced repetition and the method of loci
persona_background: You're studying for a medical licensing exam and need to memorize hundreds of terms and drug names. You're looking for effective mnemonic techniques.
greeting: Hello! I can teach memory techniques. What kind of information do you struggle to remember?
fallback: Memory techniques require practice. Start with small amounts of information and build up.
goal: Learn a set of 3 specific mnemonic techniques that can be applied to memorize drug names (e.g., 'atorvastatin', 'metformin') and medical terms (e.g., 'tachycardia', 'epistaxis'), and get a concrete example for each technique using one of these terms.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by asking for general advice on memorizing drug names and terms.
- If the chatbot gives generic study tips (e.g., 'use flashcards'), push back and specifically request mnemonic techniques with examples.
- Mention that you have trouble remembering drug names that sound similar (e.g., 'atorvastatin' vs 'simvastatin').
- If the chatbot provides a technique, ask for an example using a specific term like 'tachycardia' or 'metformin'.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you have received three distinct mnemonic techniques (e.g., acronym, story, peg word) each with a concrete example using a medical term or drug name from the background, or after 5 exchanges have occurred.
success_judgment: The chatbot is considered helpful if it provides at least two of the following: (1) a specific mnemonic technique (e.g., acronym) with an example using a drug name (e.g., 'Atorvastatin: A to Z statin'), (2) a story-based mnemonic for a medical term (e.g., 'Tachycardia: imagine a tacky heart'), (3) a peg word system example. If it only gives generic advice without examples, it fails.

name: personal-dev-critical-thinking_chatbot
summarized_goal: Develop critical thinking skills including identifying fallacies and evaluating arguments
persona_background: You often find yourself in heated online debates about politics and want to learn how to identify logical fallacies and construct more sound arguments.
greeting: Hello! I can help with critical thinking skills. In what context do you want to think more clearly?
fallback: Critical thinking takes practice. Question assumptions and seek evidence before drawing conclusions.
goal: Learn how to identify ad hominem and straw man fallacies in political debates, and practice constructing arguments using evidence and logic.
behavior_constraints:
- Start by describing a recent frustrating debate where the opponent used personal attacks (ad hominem) and misrepresented your position (straw man).
- Ask for specific examples of these fallacies and how to counter them.
- Push back if the chatbot gives generic advice without concrete examples.
- Mention that you want to improve your own argument structure, not just recognize others' errors.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you have received at least one concrete example of each fallacy (ad hominem and straw man) from the chatbot, along with a clear counter-argument technique for each, or after 5 chatbot messages if not satisfied.
success_judgment: The chatbot successfully helped if it provided: (1) a clear definition of ad hominem and straw man fallacies with examples specific to political debate, (2) a suggested response or counter-argument for each example, and (3) tips on how to structure a sound argument (e.g., using evidence, avoiding fallacies).

name: personal-dev-creativity-exercises_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get creativity exercises and techniques for brainstorming and generating ideas

fallback: Creativity often benefits from constraints. Try limiting your options to spark new ideas.

behavior_constraints:
- Initially vague about the block; only reveal specifics when asked. 
- Push back on generic advice like 'take a break' or 'just write.' 
- Mention a deadline (2 weeks) and desire for structured methods.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End when chatbot provides two actionable strategies addressing the specific block, or after 5 turns.
success_judgment: Check if chatbot identifies the block as writer's block on a sci-fi novel, asks about the deadline, and offers structured methods (e.g., outlining, timed writing sessions) rather than generic encouragement.

name: entertainment-board-games_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get board game recommendations based on player count complexity and theme preferences
persona_background: Your game night group has 4-6 players who enjoy strategy games like Settlers of Catan but want something with more depth and a fantasy theme.
greeting: Hello! I can help find board games. How many players do you usually have?
fallback: Board game complexity varies widely. Start with lighter games and build up.
goal: Find a fantasy-themed strategy board game for 4-6 players that offers more depth than Settlers of Catan, with a concrete recommendation including game name, player count, and complexity level.
behavior_constraints: ['Begin by stating the group size (4-6) and preference for fantasy theme and deeper strategy than Catan, without mentioning specific game names initially.', 'Push back if the chatbot suggests party games, games for fewer players, or games without a fantasy theme.', 'If the chatbot asks for more preferences, mention that you like resource management, variable player powers, and a playtime under 3 hours.', "Stay focused on finding a single concrete recommendation; do not accept vague suggestions like 'any game from this list'."]
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides a specific game name (e.g., 'Terra Mystica', 'Scythe', 'Blood Rage') that fits the criteria, or after 5 turns if no concrete recommendation is given.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeds if it recommends a specific fantasy strategy game for 4-6 players with more depth than Catan, such as 'Terra Mystica' (fantasy, 2-5 players but can be scaled), 'Scythe' (alternate history with fantasy elements, 1-5 players), or 'Blood Rage' (mythological fantasy, 2-4 players). The recommendation must explicitly address player count and complexity relative to Catan. Failure includes recommending games for wrong player counts (e.g., 2-4), non-fantasy themes, or games with similar depth to Catan.

name: entertainment-anime-recommendation_chatbot

behavior_constraints: ['Mention that you loved Attack on Titan and Death Note for their complex plots and dark themes.', 'Specify that you prefer dubbed versions and ask for recommendations that are available in English dub.', 'Push back if the chatbot suggests lighthearted or shonen anime without dark psychological elements.', 'Ask for details about why a recommendation fits the criteria (e.g., plot complexity, moral ambiguity).']
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: Receive 3-5 specific dubbed anime recommendations with explanations of how they match the dark psychological thriller genre, OR after 5 chatbot responses without satisfactory recommendations.
success_judgment: The chatbot provides at least 3 dubbed anime recommendations that are explicitly dark psychological thrillers (e.g., Monster, Paranoia Agent, Psycho-Pass) with explanations linking them to the user's stated preferences for complex plots and dark themes.

name: entertainment-documentary-guide_chatbot
summarized_goal: Find documentaries on topics you care about including nature history science and social issues
persona_background: You're fascinated by ocean life and climate change and want to watch a documentary series that covers both scientific research and conservation efforts.

fallback: Documentaries have varying levels of accuracy and bias. Check reviews from multiple sources before watching.

behavior_constraints:
- Initially ask for general recommendations without specifying preferred length or platform; wait for the chatbot to ask clarifying questions.
- Push back if the chatbot suggests overly broad or generic titles (e.g., 'Blue Planet' without mentioning climate change).
- Mention budget constraints only if the chatbot recommends a paid service; then state preference for free or low-cost options.
- If the chatbot provides a list, ask for details on how each series addresses conservation efforts specifically.
interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when the chatbot provides at least three specific documentary series that meet the criteria (ocean life, climate change research, conservation, post-2020) with brief explanations of their conservation focus, OR after 5 chatbot responses without a satisfactory answer.
success_judgment: The chatbot is successful if it recommends at least three documentary series that are explicitly about ocean life and climate change (e.g., 'Our Planet: Coastal Seas', 'Chasing Coral', 'Seaspiracy') and mentions how each addresses conservation efforts (e.g., highlighting coral reef restoration, overfishing solutions). The chatbot should also offer information on where to watch them (platform and cost).

name: entertainment-audiobook-selection_chatbot

interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when a specific audiobook title is recommended that meets all criteria (self-improvement, motivating narrator, 10+ hours) or after 5 turns without a suitable recommendation.
success_judgment: The chatbot is successful if it recommends an audiobook that is self-improvement, has a motivating narrator, and is at least 10 hours long, and the persona confirms satisfaction with the recommendation.

name: entertainment-youtube-channels_chatbot

persona_background: You enjoy DIY woodworking and home improvement projects and want to find YouTube channels that offer detailed tutorials with minimal fluff, around 10-15 minutes each.

fallback: YouTube algorithm recommendations improve as you engage with content you enjoy.

behavior_constraints:

- Mention that you prefer concise, step-by-step instructions without unnecessary talking.

interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you have received at least 3 channel recommendations that match the criteria (detailed, minimal fluff, 10-15 minute videos) or after 5 assistant turns without a satisfactory recommendation.
success_judgment: The chatbot succeeded if it recommended at least 3 YouTube channels that: (a) focus on woodworking or home improvement, (b) have detailed tutorials with minimal fluff (i.e., no long intros, little to no unrelated chatter), and (c) typical video length is 10-15 minutes. If the chatbot suggests channels with longer videos or excessive fluff, and does not adjust after feedback, it failed.

name: sustainability-sustainable-fashion_chatbot

interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
termination_conditions: End the conversation when you have received at least 3 specific brand names with confirmed under-$50 items using organic cotton/recycled materials, or after 5 turns of chatbot failing to provide concrete answers.

Failure if the chatbot gives only generic advice, recommends brands without price or material verification, or fails to address the budget constraint.

name: sustainability-green-renovation_chatbot
summarized_goal: Get guidance on eco-friendly home renovation including materials energy efficiency and certifications

fallback: Green renovation materials may cost more upfront but can save money on utilities over time.

interaction_requirements: At least two back-and-forth exchanges (4+ messages total).
